rulings.Case Title: JAIME MALDONADO VS. SUSANA E. MALDONADO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relilef From Order Sustaining Demurrer And Judgment Of Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF JAIME MALDONADO'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR RELILEF FROM ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER AND JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL is continued to April 19, 2023 per stipulation of the parties. Moving party to present an order on stipulation filed on February 6, 2023 for execution at 9:30 a.m. on February 16, 2023. If order is not presented, the motion will be taken off calendar. =(501/ACM) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
